description: Converts 10% of your HP into SP. The higher the skill level the more effective the conversion will be. The conversion rate is 10:1 modified by SkillLV, so a 2000 HP Professor with Health Conversion LV 3 would consume 2000*10%=200 HP and obtain a total of 200*30%=60 SP.

name: Soul Change
description: Exchange SP of the target with your SP. With this exchange it's not possible for any of the partners to exceed their Maximum SP. If you use this on a monster, you regain 3% of your SP. You can't use this skill on a monster again that already had Soul Change. You can use this skill in Siege Mode (WoE).

name: Soul Burn
description: This skill will burn all SP the target has, thus damaging it with its own SP. Since this damage is done to the mental system, it will be decreased by the target's Mdef. If you fail this skill, YOUR SP will be drained, and you will damage yourself. The damage is equal to twice the removed SP.

name: Advanced Katar Mastery
description: Enhances damage inflicted with Katar class weapons.

name: Enchant Deadly Poison
description: Enchants equipped weapon with deadly poison to enhance its damage and poison targets by chance, causing the target's HP to dramatically decrease for the poison's duration. This damage enhancement will not apply to Boss monsters. Each cast requires 1 Poison Bottle.

name: Soul Destroyer
requirements: Double Attack 5, Envenom 5, Cloaking 3, Enchant Poison 6
description: Inflicts a ranged attack to a target, calculated as half of the target's DEF added to half of its MDEF, that is affected by the caster's INT and ATK.

name: True Sight
description: Adds +5 to all Stats, as well as increases attack accuracy, weapon damage and critical attack rate.

name: Falcon Assault
description: Commands Falcon to attack an enemy with numerous strikes.

name: Sharp Shooting
description: Shoots an arrow with incredible might directly towards a targeted spot, greatly damaging any enemies in its path. This is a Critical Attack that is calculated as the caster's Critical Attack Rate +20.

name: Wind Walk
description: Increases movement speed and Flee Rate of the caster and Party Members. However, movement speed will not increased if a similar effect, such as Increase Agility, has already been cast. Skills which decrease movement speed, such as Quagmire, cancel the movement speed increase from Wind Walker.

name: Melt Down
description: This skill has the chance of destroying an equipped weapon or armor when used in PvP zones on other players, or to decrease Attack Power or Defense when used on monsters. This skill's level affects its duration and rate of success.

name: Cart Boost
description: Increases Movement Speed when a Pushcart is equipped. Effect which decrease movement speed cannot interfere with this skill.

name: Chase Walk
description: Enters a special Hiding status in which caster can move without being detected by skills. However, the caster will leave footprints and can be damaged by skills that target the ground. Ineffective against Insect, Demon and Boss monsters. Passive: Learning this skill multiplicatively increases Raid damage and adds to Backstab opportunity modifier . During WoE, this skill will consume 5 times as much SP. 6 SP/5 sec, +10% Raid/+8% Backstab. 7 SP/5 sec, +20% Raid/+16% Backstab. 8 SP/5 sec, +30% Raid/+24% Backstab. 9 SP/5 sec, +40% Raid/+32% Backstab. 10 SP/5 sec, +50% Raid/+40% Backstab.

name: Sword Reject
description: If enemy is using a Sword Class Weapon, activating this skill deflects attacks, reducing damage from Swords by a percentage. A total of 3 attacks can be deflected after this skill is casted. On monsters, the damage that is deflected will be directed back at the monster. This skill maximum reflected and reduced is capped at 25% of the caster's maximum health

name: Alchemy
description: This skill has been dropped by Gravity. You can create many items that are needed for the Pharmacy skill such as Empty Bottles, Empty Potion Bottles and Test Tubes.

name: Synthesis Potion
description: This skill has been dropped by Gravity. Combine different potions to create new ones. There are already set rules to what can be mixed, and the problem is the success rate. You can create potions that weigh less, but perform the same... or create heavier potions that heal for far more. For potions that summon creatures to attack, they might have better attack rate, or have a new skill to use.

name: Arrow Vulcan
requirements: Musical Strike 1, Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5,
Throw Arrow 1, Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5,
description: Fires an awesome flurry of arrows at a targeted enemy. Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and Whip for Gypsy.

name: Moonlit Water Mill
description: Upkeep SP Cost: 4*SkillLV SP every 10 sec Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill that creates a 5*5 cell area around the casters where other players and monsters cannot enter. This skill cannot offer protection from magic or long ranged attacks. This skill cannot be cast in areas that are adjacent to obstacles.

name: Marionette Control
description: Targeted Party Member receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of the Stats of the caster. However, each of the target's Stats cannot exceed 99. This skill is cancelled if this Party Member is more than 7 cells away from the caster.

name: Spiral Pierce
requirements: Spear Mastery 10, Pierce 5, Riding 1, Spear Stab 5
description: Hits an enemy with spiraling strikes that immobilize it for a second and inflict an amount of damage determined by the skill's level and the weight of the equipped weapon. This skill's level also affects its cast time and delay.

name: Head Crush
description: Brutally strikes an enemy with the chance of causing the Bleeding status, which will make the target continuously receive extra damage for a while.

name: Joint Beat
requirements: Spear Mastery 9, Riding 1, Cavalry Mastery 3, Head Crush 3
description: Strikes an enemy's vital point to cause various abnormal statuses. This skill's level affects the Attack Power and the success rate of causing abnormal status effects. Requires Spear Class Weapon.

name: Napalm Vulcan
description: Delivers multiple psychokinetic blows at an enemy with a low chance of causing an abnormal status. This skill's level affects the number of strikes from Napalm Vulcan. All levels of this spell ignores 50% of the enemy Magic Defense (both the hard and soft defense)

name: Dangerous Soul Collect
description: Summons 5 Spirit Spheres at one time. The cast time of this skill is twice the cast time of the Call Spirits skill.

name: Mind Breaker
description: Induces mental turmoil in an enemy that will reduce its Magic Defense, but will also increases its Magic Attack Power. This skill's level affects its rate of success.

name: Memorize
description: Reduces cast time for a skill by half for 5 casts. This skill is canceled when caster dies, but otherwise it has no duration. Memorize's cast time, which is unaffected by DEX, is 5 seconds.

name: Wall of Fog
description: Creates a wall of fog in a 5*3 cell area that will cause the Blind status on players and monsters. All long ranged attacks targeted at players within the skill's range will have a greater chance of missing and have reduced damage. Negative effects only apply to monsters in normal fields, but will also apply to players in PvP zones.

name: Spider Web
description: Shoots a spider web that will bind and immobilize a target, and decrease its Flee Rate by half for 8 seconds. Fire elemental attacks will cause 2.5 times more damage on Fiber Locked targets and cancel the Fiber Locked status. A maximum of 2 Spider Webs can be shot at once. Consumes 1 Cobweb.

name: Meteor Assault
requirements: Katar Mastery 5, Right-Hand Mastery 3, Sonic Blow 5, Soul Destroyer 1
description: Attacks all enemies in a 5*5 cell area around the caster with the chance of causing status such as Stun, Blind or Bleed.

name: Create Deadly Poison
description: Creates a bottle of Deadly Poison that will increase the ASPD of Assassin Crosses with the risk of being inflicted with the Poison status, but will instantly kill characters in any other job if they drink it. Caster's DEX and LUK affect this skill's success rate. If this skill fails, the caster loses an amount of HP equal to 25% of his MaxHP. Items required to create Deadly Poison: 1 Empty Bottle 1 Poison Spore 1 Venom Canine 1 Bee Sting 1 Cactus Needle 1 Berserk Potion 1 Karvodailnirol

name: Mom, Dad, I love you!
description: Caster's parent characters will not lose any experience points when they die. Caster consumes 10% of Maximum SP for each use.

name: Mom, Dad, I miss you!
description: Child character summons parents to a spot next to where child is standing.

name: Come to me, honey~
description: Parent character summons adopted child to a spot adjacent to parent's current location.

name: Running
description: Enables the caster to run with incredible speed. At level 7 and above, this skill endows the caster with the Spurt status, which will temporarily increase STR for 150 seconds, If the caster stops running and is barehanded. Spurt status is canceled if the caster equips a weapon. Each level of the Run skill increases its user's barehanded damage by +10.

name: Prepare Whirlwind Kick
description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Tornado Stance when the caster successfully hits a target. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Whirlwind Kick
description: Caster must be in Tornado Stance to perform this skill which will attack all enemies within a 5*5 cell area around the caster. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Prepare Axe Kick
description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Heel Drop Stance when the caster successfully hits a target. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Axe Kick
description: Caster must be in Heel Drop Stance to perform this skill which will inflict damage and cause the Stun effect for 3 seconds on the targeted enemy. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Prepare Round Kick
description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Roundhouse Stance when the caster successfully hits a target. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Round Kick
description: Caster must be in Roundhouse Stance to perform this skill which will damage its target and push back enemies around the target. Enemies that are pushed do not receive any damage. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Prepare Counter Kick
description: Enables a 20% chance of automatically entering Counter Kick Stance when the caster successfully hits a target. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Counter Kick
description: Caster must be in Counter Kick Stance to perform this skill which will always hit its target. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Break Fall
description: Enables a 20% chance of blocking long ranged physical attacks. When caster is in Spurt status (after performing Lv 7 Sprint or higher), Tumbling will also block other kinds of attacks.

name: Flying Side Kick
description: Attacks a distant enemy with a kick that instantly close the gap between the target and the player. When in Tumbling status, the caster's Base Level affects the amount of inflicted damage. Flying Kick will have increased damage affected by Base Level during Sprint status. If Spurt and Sprint statuses are both active, Flying Kick will inflict enhanced damage. Flying Kick will also cancel most positive statuses on the target, which include Spirit statuses endowed by Soul Linkers, One Hand Quicken, Kaahi, Kaite, and the Berserk Potion effect. However, Stalkers can protect themselves from this positive status removal effect with their Preserve skill. Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill.

name: Peaceful Rest
description: When two or more Taekwon class characters sit next to each other, HP will be restored for both characters. This HP restoration is affected by VIT and enhanced by an additional 30 HP with the /doridori command.

name: Enjoyable Rest
description: When two or more Taekwon class characters sit next to each other, SP will be restored for both characters. This SP restoration is affected by MaxSP and enhanced by an additional 3 SP with the /doridori command. Using the /doridori command while in Happy Break status will make it last for 30 minutes. During this status, the caster will have a low chance of using the Earth Spike spell scroll, with a 10% chance at Skill Level 1, and a 1% chance at Skill Level 10. Using the Earth Spike scroll during this status will consume 10 SP.

name: Fighting Chant
description: Increases Attack Power based on the number of Party Members on the same map. Normal attacks, and skills with 500% power, inflict an amount of additional according to the skill's level.

name: Warm Wind
description: Summons a wind that will enchant the caster's attacks for 5 minutes with an elemental property based on the level of the casted skill.

name: High Jump
description: Leaps to a targeted cell within the skill's range. So long as the targeted cell is accesibble, the caster can leap over walls and obstacles. Leap cannot be used in areas where Fly Wings are disabled, except for WoE maps. Cast Time & Skill Range by Level

name: Feeling of the Sun, Moon and Stars
description: Designate the current map with one of the cosmic alignments, Solar, Lunar or Stellar, for the use of certain skills. It is impossible to change a map's cosmic alignment once it is designated. Using this skill on a cosmically aligned map will display a list of map designations. Only 1 map may be designated for each cosmic alignment.

levels.effect: Designate current map with Solar alignment
Designate current map with Lunar alignment
Designate current map with Stellar alignment

name: Warmth of the Sun
description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Sun" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back. Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage.

name: Warmth of the Moon
description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Moon" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back. Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage.

name: Warmth of the Stars
description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Stars" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back. Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage.

name: Comfort of the Sun
description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Sun in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Sun" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). This skill increases your Vit Defense by (LV+Dex+Luk)/2. If Def changes during its duration, the skill is cancelled.

name: Comfort of the Moon
description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Moon in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Moon" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). This skill increases your Flee Rate by (LV+Dex+Luk)/10.

name: Comfort of the Stars
description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Stars in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Stars" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent). This skill increases your ASPD by [(LV+Dex+Luk)/10]%.

name: Hatred of the Sun, Moon, and Stars
description: Can be casted only once per Target. When you use this skill, the name of the monster whom you just marked will be displayed and marked. You can also use this on player characters, and they will be categorized by class, ignoring size and HP. Example: It will show above the player characters, Champion, if target player was a Champion character, and on all other characters who are of Champion class.

levels.effect: Mark as Target of the Sun. On mobs, it can only be used on Small monsters.
Mark as Target of the Moon. On mobs, it can only be used on Medium size monsters that have a Maximum HP higher than 6,000.
Mark as Target of the Stars. On mobs, it can only be used on Large size monsters that have a Maximum HP higher than 20,000.

name: Anger of the Sun
description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Sun mobs.

name: Anger of the Moon
description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Moon mobs.

name: Anger of the Stars
description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Stars mobs.

name: Blessing of the Sun
description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Sun (monsters only) in the Day of the Sun by (10*SkillLV)%.

name: Blessing of the Moon
description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Moon (monsters only) in the Day of the Moon by (10*SkillLV)%.

name: Blessing of the Stars
description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Stars (monsters only) in the Day of the Stars by (20*SkillLV)%.

name: Demon of the Sun, Moon and Stars
description: This skill's effects will only activate for Job Lv. 50 characters. Increasing this skills' level will permanently increase Attack Speed and reduce character's vision, similarly to the Blind effect.

name: Friend of the Sun, Moon and Stars
description: When Star Gladiator uses Counter Kick, all Monks in the same party will have their Triple Attack chance increased. If the Monks who are in same party as Star Gladiator activate Combo Finish, Star Gladiator's chance of Counter Kick increases. The chance increase is not added to the current one, e.g. having this skill at LV 1 will not give 100% Triple Attack/Counter Kick but just double the chance for those skills to occur.

name: Knowledge of the Sun, Moon and Stars
description: When you login the game on a map (only login, NOT by walking/teleporting) that is designated as Place of the Sun, or Moon, or Stars, this passive skill grants you increased weight capacity at +(10*SkillLV)%. If you stay outside the Place of the Sun, or Moon, or Stars for too long, this effect disappears.

name: Union of the Sun, Moon and Stars
description: The power of this skill is unleashed when linked to a Soul Linker using the Star Gladiator Spirit (if not linked, the SP is wasted and nothing happens). When linked, your movement speed is increased and all your attacks never miss and ignore Def, but you lose 2% of your HP every time you attack a monster and 8% HP every time you attack a player, also if you attack a player when you only have 20% HP left, you will be killed instantly afterwards.

name: Alchemist Spirit
description: Soullinks to Alchemists and Creators, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - Increases effectiveness of Potion Pitcher by Soul Linker's BaseLV% (if the Soul Linker is BaseLV 68, Potion Pitcher heals +68%. - Allows usage of Berserk Pitcher skill. - Alchemists having Pharmacy LV 10 are allowed to use Twilight Alchemy I. - If there is a Super Novice in the party the Alchemist is further allowed to use Twilight Alchemy II. - If there is a TaeKwon in the party the Alchemist is further allowed to use Twilight Alchemy III.

name: Berserk Pitcher
description: Throws a Berserk Potion at the target, that takes effect ignoring class restrictions, but the target still needs to be BaseLV 85 or more.

name: Monk Spirit
description: Soullinks to Monks and Champions, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - The Combo Finish attack becomes a 5x5 cell splash attack. - SP Cost of combo skills is decreased. - Allow SP regeneration in Critical Explosion state.

name: Star Gladiator Spirit
description: Soullinks to Star Gladiators, allowing the usage of the "Union of the Sun, Moon and Stars" skill.

name: Sage Spirit
description: Soullinks to Sages and Professors, allowing their Auto Spell Skill to always produce LV 10 Bolts if the Sage has learned that much in the Bolt Skill.

name: Crusader Spirit
description: Soullinks to Crusaders and Paladins, making their Shield Boomerang never miss, do double the damage, and halving its after cast delay.

name: Super Novice Spirit
description: Soullinks to Super Novices, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - Super Novices above LV 90 will be temporarily able to equip ALL Upper/Middle/Lower headgears. - Super Novices above LV 90 have 1% chance to 'erase' the death record - which means, the last 1% EXP loss will be recovered. - Super Novices above LV 96 will be temporarily able to equip LV 4 Daggers, 1H Swords, Axes, Maces, and Staffs.

name: Knight Spirit
description: Soullinks to Knights and Lord Knights, allowing those who have Two-Hand Quicken LV 10 to use One-Hand Quicken for the skill's duration.

name: Wizard Spirit
description: Soullinks to Wizards and High Wizards, allowing them to cast all Gemstone requiring Skills without using them up (however, it still requires the Wizard to have at least one of the respective Gemstone) for the skill's duration. When the Wizard has a "Crystal Fragment" while under this skill's effect, the item will be used, and any spells that were reflected back to you via Kaite will simply disappear instead of hitting you.

name: Priest Spirit
description: Soullinks to Priests and High Priests, boosting the power of Holy Light by +400% but also increasing its SP Cost by +400% for the skill's duration.

name: Bard and Dancer Spirits
description: Soullinks to Bards, Clowns, Dancers and Gypsies, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - All singing/dancing skills affect the Bard/Dancer him/herself. - While singing/dancing the walking speed is increased. - A Whistle and Humming linked. - Assassin Cross of Sunset and Please Don't Forget Me linked. - A Poem of Bragi and Fortune's Kiss linked. - The Apple of Idun and Service for You linked. Linked means, if X skill is mastered, then Y skill can be used too while in "Spirit" mode.

name: Rogue Spirit
description: Soullinks to Rogues and Stalkers, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - Dispell no longer removes your buffs. - Potions created by someone who is high on the alchemist rank have their effect increased. - Str bonus from Tunnel Drive will last 5 minutes and walking speed will also increase.

name: Assassin Spirit
description: Soullinks to Assassins and Assassins Cross, boosting their Sonic Blow by doubling its damage and halving the Cool Down for the skill's duration. However, the bonuses are reduced to +25% bonus damage and no Cool Down bonus when in Siege Mode (WoE)

name: Blacksmith Spirit
description: Soullinks to Blacksmiths and Whitesmiths, allowing them to use Full Adrenaline Rush if they have Adrenaline Rush LV5 for the skill's duration.

name: Full Adrenaline Rush
description: Decreases character's attack delay with all weapons, including ranged by 30%. Decreases nearby party menbers attack delay with all weapons except ranged by 20%. These two effects are supposed to stack with each other when used by more than one Smith in a party. Changing from a mace/axe to any other weapon (including bare fists) cancels the effect. Does not stack with other skills that directly increase ASPD.

name: Hunter Spirit
description: Soullinks to Hunters and Snipers, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration. - Effectiveness of Beast Bane is increased by Hunters/Snipers Str. - If Double Strafing is LV 10, a new skill, Beast Strafing, will be available.

name: Soul Linker Spirit
description: Soullinks to other Soul Linkers (you can not link to yourself), allowing them to use "Ka- Type" skills on any other class, for the skill's duration.

name: Kaizel
description: When you die, you are immediately resurrected with (10*SkillLV)% HP. After being resurrected Kaizel is dispelled but you have a 2 seconds lasting Kyrie Eleison buff. This skill has no effect in guild siege / WoE. Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Kaahi
description: While this buff lasts, every time you are successfully attacked (skill attacks are not affected), it takes 5*SkillLV SP and heals 200*SkillLV HP. If you receive many attacks in a short time, the skill heal you for the total of the attacks (up to the heal limit). Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Kaupe
description: Allows you to absolutely evade an enemy attack. Evade all types of attacks from players (normal, skills, spells), but for area multi-hit spells like LoV only the 1st hit is dodged. It only dodge normal attacks from mobs, not their skills. When you evade even once, the effect disappears. Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Kaite
description: Reflects all offensive magic and Heal back to the caster. It does not reflect status skills (those that make no damage) like Stone Curse. LV 1-4 reflect once, LV 5-7 reflect twice before disappearing. If the Heal skill used on you gets reflected, the amount of healing done to the caster will be reduced. Will not reflect spells from Boss monsters and monsters above LV 80. Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Kaina
description: Increases the power of Enjoyable Rest by (30+10*SkillLV)% and Maximum SP by 30*SkillLV. Also, if your BaseLV is above 70, Kaina reduce Estin, Estun, Esma's SP Cost by (3*SkillLV)%. If BaseLV is above 80, (5*SkillLV)%. If BaseLV is above 90, (7*SkillLV)% for max of 49%.

name: Estin
description: Magical skill that attacks only Small monsters. The affected monster is pushed back by 2 cells. When this is used on monsters that are not Small, it will do nearly no damage, but it will push them back. When LV 7 version of this skill is used, you can use Esma for next 3 seconds. "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Estun
description: Magical skill that attacks only Medium monsters. The affected monster is stunned for 2 sec. When this is used on Small monsters it won't stun them, but it will do full damage. When LV 7 version of this skill is used, you can use Esma for next 3 seconds. "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Esma
description: Strong Magic attack that changes its element depending on Warm Wind. This skill can also be used (within 3 seconds) after casting any kind of "Spirit"-type buffs. "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Eswoo
description: Makes the monster small, greatly reducing their walking speed, but the size attribute is not affected. If this is used on a Boss monster, this skill only lasts 1/5 of normal time. If you use Eswoo on a monster that is already under this effect, it will cause you to be stunned for 10 seconds (reduced by Vit). "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Eske
description: Increases monster's Atk by +300%, but halves their Def. You can cast Esma within 3 seconds after using Eske. "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Eska
description: Forces the monster to have a state similar to Monk Steel Body, but without blocking the skills. Mdef is set to 90 and Def change randomly every second, ASPD is not affected. Works on Boss and Miniboss type monsters. "Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

name: Preserve
description: Prevents the automatic copying of skills through the Plagiarism skill. in order to preserve the last skill copied through Plagiarism.

name: Full Strip
requirements: Strip Armor 3, Strip Shield 3, Strip Weapon 3, Strip Helm 3
description: Casts all four Strip skills at the same time. This skill's success rate increases if the caster has an higher level than the target. This skill works versus bosses, though the debuff is halved Learning this skill enables the Stolen Buffs. Only one Stolen Buff can be active at once. You may remove Stolen Buffs to get another by using any Strip Skill on yourself. Applies Stolen Core to Caster on success. Stolen Core: Applies all 4 other Stolen Buffs, but loses 1% health every 2 seconds for the duration.

name: Weapon Refine
description: Refines weapons to increase their grade. Unlike weapon smithing, which is affected by DEX or LUK, this skill's success rate is affected by the caster's Job Level. Whitesmith have same rate of success as Item Upgrade NPCs at Job Level 50, has 5% greater chance of success than Item Upgrade NPCs at Job Level 60, and have a 10% greater chance of success at Job Level 70. If upgrade attempt fails, the weapon will be destroyed. Level 1 Weapon require 1 Phracon. Level 2 Weapon require 1 Emveretarcon. Level 3-4 Weapon requires 1 Oridecon.

name: Slim Potion Pitcher
description: Consumes 1 Slim Potion to heal all Party Members within a 7*7 cell area around the targeted spot.

name: Full Chemical Protection
description: Protects the targeted character with all four kinds of chemical protection. Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat.

name: Shield Chain
description: Enables the chance of striking an enemy 5 times with a Shield while in battle. Accuracy Rate affects success chance and the Shield's weight and Upgrade status affects the amount of damage. Shield Chain has 1 second cast delay and range of 4 cells. Requires Shield.

name: Mana Recharge
description: Decreases SP Cost of all your skills.

name: Double Casting
description: During the skill's duration, all eligible spells have a chance of being casted a second time instantly. Spells: All Bolt-type[Fire Bolt, Cold Bolt and Lightning Bolt] spells (including autospells), Earth Spike and Soul Strike If an autospell is activated while Double Casting is active, the second cast of the double-casting will be at half the original level.

name: Ganbantein
description: 100% chance of canceling ground targeting magic spell cast on a 3*3 cell area around the targeted spot. This skill will cancel Land Protector on areas that have been enchanted by that skill. This skill is unaffected by items or skills that remove Gemstone requirements. Has 5 second cast delay. Each cast requires 1 Blue Gemstone and Yellow Gemstone.

name: Gravitation Field
description: Increases the gravity in a 7*7 AoE which will decrease the Attack Speed of enemies and cause continuous damage that ignore Defense. This skill's effect on Attack and Movement Speeds does not apply to Boss monsters. If the player is 30 cells away from their gravity field, field will disappear Has 1.5 second cast delay.

name: Cart Termination
description: This skill is only enabled during Cart Boost status. Spends a certain amount of zeny to smash Pushcart into an enemy with a chance of inflicting the Stun status. The amount of this skill's damage is affected by the skill's level and the weight of items carried in the Pushcart.

name: Maximum Over Thrust
description: Increases weapon damage by spending a certain amount of zeny. Cannot be activated to anyone beside the caster. Has 0.1% chance of destroying user's weapon every time when attacking.

name: Longing for Freedom
description: Enables movement of Gypsy and Clown within an Ensemble skill's range, as well as the use of normal attacks and skills aside from Ensemble skills, while performing Ensemble skill. The caster will continously spend SP through the duration of the performed Ensemble skill. Longing for Freedom is cancelled when the Gypsy or Clown move out of the Ensemble skill's range, dies, or uses the Adaptation to Circumstances skill.

name: Wand of Hermode
description: This skill can only be used near Warp Portal inside WoE maps during WoE times. Hermode's Rod will cancel all positive status, aside from Berserk, from all friendly targets except for the caster, and will block any magic spells cast of this skill's targets. No one including the caster can use any skills for the skill's duration, but Hermode's Rod is canceled upon leaving its effective range.

name: Tarot Card of Fate
description: Cast a randomly chosen effect from one out of 14 tarot cards. The level of this skill affects the chance of success.

name: Acid Demonstration
description: Attacks an enemy by throwing both a Bottle Grenade and an Acid Bottle, inflicting an amount of damage that is affected by the skill's level, the caster's INT and the target's VIT. This skill only inflicts 50% of its damage on other players, but it has the chance of damaging that player's weapon or armor. Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade and 1 Acid Bottle.

name: Plant Cultivation
description: Initiates an attempt, which will have a 50% chance of success, to create a random type of Mushroom from a Mushroom Spore, or a Plant from a Stem. This skill is disabled during WoE.

name: TaeKwon Mission
description: This skill is disabled once a character changes to an advanced job, such as Star Gladiator or Soul Linker. Activating this skill will display the current monster target for the Taekwon Mission. Taekwon Boys and Girls will earn 1 Taekwon Mission Point by defeating 100 target monsters. Fulfilling the 100 target monster quota will begin a new Taekwon Mission with a randomly chosen target. Mini Boss and Boss monsters will never be chosen as targets. Taekwon characters that achieve the Top 10 Taekwon Ranking by earning the most Taekwon Mission Points can string combos with the Tornado Kick, Roundhouse, Heel Drop, and Counter Kick skills. Taekwon Rankers at Base Level 90 and above with have tripled MaxHP and MaxSP, and will be able to use all Taekwon Boy and Girl skills.

name: Rebirth Spirit
description: Calls upon the spirits of the most powerful 1st Transcendent Class warriors ever so that they can lend their powers to their successors. This skill will increase every Stat for friendly 1st Transcendent characters based on their Base Level, but each Stat bonus will not exceed +50.

name: One-Hand Quicken
description: Increases attack speed when using a One-Handed Sword class weapon. Activating this skill cancels the effect of any potions that have a similar effect, but it is possible to use these potions after One Hand Quicken has been cast. Unequipping Sword will cancel this skill's effect.

name: Twilight Alchemy I
description: Make 200 attempts to create a White Potion every 0.005 seconds. This skill has the same success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If there are not enough ingredients to create all 200 at once, the skill will fail. Check the Potion Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients.

name: Twilight Alchemy II
description: Make 200 attempts to create a Condensed White Potion every 0.005 seconds. This skill has the same success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If there are not enough ingredients to create all 200 at once, the skill will fail. Check the Condensed Potion Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients. Note: You need a Soul Linker and Super novice on your party to this skill to work.

name: Twilight Alchemy III
description: Creates 100 Alcohol, 50 Acid Bottle and 50 Bottle Grenade. Each cast requires 50 Fabric, 50 Empty Bottle and enough materials to craft the produced items. If there are not enough ingredients to create them all at once, the skill will fail. Check the Alcohol Creation Guide, Acid Bottle Creation Guide and Bottle Grenade Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients. Note: You need a Taekwon Boy on your party to this skill to work.

name: Beast Strafing
description: Attacks by using a modified form of Double Strafe that was developed to cause extra damage to Brute monsters. Caster's STR affects the amount of inflicted damage.

name: Flip the Coin
description: Consumes (2*SkillLv)^2 zeny to flip a coin. The caster will gain 2*SkillLevel coin. The caster can have a maximum of 10 coins. The zeny cost will automatically be adjusted to CoinsGained^2 (with minimum 4 zeny) in case caster already have coins There is (2*SkillLevel)% chance to not cost any zeny Gunslinger coins are displayed as glowing orbs around the caster.

name: Fling
description: Spends coins to fling them at an enemy to inflict damage and reduce its DEF. Fling can consume up to 5 coins in a single cast, and will reduce more of an enemy's DEF if more coins are spent.

name: Triple Action
description: Shoots an enemy 3 times in one attack (420% Total Damage). Consumes 1 coin.

name: Tranq Shot
description: Inflicts 100% damage to Demihuman and Brute monsters. Tranq Shot has 140% chance to inflict Sleep status for 6 seconds Consumes 1 coin.

name: Barrage
description: Activates Barrage in which the ASPD is increased by 20%, Damage by 30%, but halves movement speed. Barrage has 20 second duration and cannot be used with 'Run and Gun' skill. Consumes 2 coins.

name: Run and Gun
description: Activates 'Run and Gun' status in which caster has increased movement speed for 5 seconds.For duration of skill, +30 Flee and receives 30% less damage from ranged physical attacks. This skill has a 120 seconds duration, and cannot be used together with the 'Barrage' skill. Consumes 1 coin.

name: Increasing Accuracy
description: Adds +20 HIT, +4 DEX, and +4 AGI for 1 minute duration. Consumes 4 coins.

name: Soul Bullet
description: Fires 3 magic shot that does not use any bullets, inflicting an amount of Ghost elemental damage equal to the caster's (- 50 + DEX + Base_Lvl). Consumes 1 coin.

name: Wing Clip
description: Fires a bullet that will reduce enemy's movement speed for 10 seconds (Reducible by target's AGI). Consumes 1 coin.

name: Single Action
description: Essential Gunslinger skill that enables Gunslinger to fire their weapon more quickly and accurately.

name: Snake's Eye
description: Increases attack range and HIT when equipped with Gun class weapons.

name: Chain Action
description: 70% chance of firing two shots in single attack while attacking enemies when equipped with Revolver class weapon. Raising this skill's level increases the rate of firing double shots. Consumes 1 bullet. Requires Revolver class weapon.

name: Tracking
description: Carefully aims at a target to inflict devastating damage(Critical Attack enabled). Raising this skill's level increases cast time and damage. Requires Revolver or Rifle class weapon.

name: Disarm
description: Weapon:  Shotgun/Grenade Launcher/Revolvers/Rifles/Gatling Guns Shoots target's appendages to render it incapable of attacking. Skill level, user level and target level affects the success rate. When used on monster, this skill will reduce their Attack by 20%, but 10% (and 8 seconds) on Boss monsters. Disarm has a range of 9 cells. Consumes 1 coin.

name: Wounding Shot
description: Inflicts Defense piercing damage that has a chance of causing Bleeding status on its target. Bleeding chance is increased if you have coins when using this skill.

name: Rapid Shower
description: Attacks an enemy with 5 rapid fire attack. Consumes 5 bullets. Requires Revolver class weapon.

name: Desperado
description: Consumes 5 bullets to perform a haphazard attack that may damage enemies within a 7 cell radius around the caster. Each cast has a maximum of 10 strikes. Requires Revolver class weapon.

name: Gatling Fever
description: Temporarily increases attack speed and damage. Gatling Fever status is cancelled when this skill is casted again. Requires Gatling Gun class weapon.

name: Dust
description: Fires a close range shot that will push an enemy 5 cells backward. If learned, Increases Base Atk by 1 Per STR When the skill has been mastered at 10 Skill Level, the player has 7% resistance against neutral damage. Requires Shotgun or Grenade Launcher class weapon.

name: Full Buster
description: Inflicts devastating damage to an enemy by firing multiple bullets at once. When the skill has been mastered at 10 Skill Level, the player has 7% resistance against neutral damage. Requires Shotgun class weapon.

name: Spread Attack
description: Consumes 5 bullets to spread damage over a large area. When the skill has been mastered at 10 Skill Level, the player has 7% resistance against neutral damage. Requires Shotgun class weapon.

name: Ground Drift
description: Plants Bullet Spheres into the ground that will explode upon enemy approach. The explosion's effect varies according to the type of bullet. Deals half DMG when the mine hits more than 1 target - AoE Size 5x5 Requires Grenade Launcher class weapon.

name: Throwing Mastery
description: Increases Throw Shuriken damage.

name: Throw Shuriken
description: Throws a Shuriken at a target from a distance of up to 9 cells away from the caster. No longer ignores Flee. Enables auto attacks, which stop upon item usage, skill usage, or when all shurikens are consumed. Consumes 1 Shuriken.

name: Throw Kunai
description: Throws a Kunai that will strike its target 3 times in one attack. The attack's element is affected by the type of Kunai thrown. Consumes 1 Kunai.

name: Throw Huuma Shuriken
description: Throws Huuma Shuriken that will damage its target and any nearby nemies. The total amount of damage is divided among the enemies(except the target) damaged by this skill. Split Formula: Damage / (1 + (NoOfTargets - 1) / 2) Raising this skill's level increases its number of strikes.

name: Throw Zeny
description: Throws coins at a target to inflict an amount of Defense piercing damage equal to the amount of zeny spent in the attack. Damage is reduced in PvP area. Damage is not reduced against Boss monsters. This skill has 2 sec after cast delay.

name: Flip Tatami
description: Flips tatami to cause the 4*4 area around the caster to ignore long range physical damage for specified duration. Has a chance to damage and push enemies 3 cells backward if they are within the skill's attack range. This skill has 1.3 seconds after cast delay. Skill affects caster and doesn't work on party/guild members.

name: Haze Slash
description: Strikes an enemy and removes the Hiding status. Executes 5 strikes within a 5x5 AoE [When Hidden] Damage is increaed by 40% of total damage. SP requirement is halved

name: Shadow Jump
description: This skill instantly moves the caster to a targeted cell, ignoring obstacles in the caster's way and then immediately enters the Hiding status (can be followed by Haze Slash or Shadow Slash). This skill cannot be used while hidden. Hide Timer: 3 seconds

name: Shadow Slash
description: Strikes a target with an attack whose range is equal to the caster's Shadow Jump range. Shadow Slash no longer possesses the capability to land critical strikes. However, when paired with the platinum skill - Shadow's Within, critical hits become a possibility [In Hiding State] [Otherwise] Damage is reduced by 10%-50% depending on distance between caster and target

name: Cicada Skin Shed
description: Enables Cicada Skin Shed status, which enables the caster to automatically dodge a set number of attacks. Each special dodge is followed by a backward movement of 7 cells. Terminates Mirror image effect When the number of attacks reaches the skill's limit, Cicada Skin Shed status is cancelled.

name: Mirror Image
requirements: Shadow Slash 3, Ninja Aura 1, Cicada Skid Shed 4
description: Mirror Image can only be cast during Ninja Aura status, and consumes 1 Shadow Orb. Create a mirror image that will enable the caster to dodge a set number of long and short range physical attacks. Terminates any ongoing Cicada Skin Shed effects. Damage is increased by (10+5*AttacksLeft)% on non-PvP/non-GvG maps Additionally, This skill can block single-target magic based attack.

name: Ninja Training
description: Increases SP regen by training in the Ninja Arts. The amount of SP restored by this skill is affected by the character's MaxSP.

name: Flaming Petals
description: Inflicts Fire elemental damage at a target by shooting flaming petals. This skill's level affects the number of strikes. Each strike inflicts an amount of damage equal to 90% of the caster's MATK.

name: Blaze Shield
description: Summons a blazing storm in a 5*5 cell area around the caster that will deliver multiple strikes to enemies within its range. The Blaze Shield lasts for 20 seconds, but is automatically canceled after inflicting its maximum number of strikes. Blaze Shield has evolved into a skill that can now hit multiple enemies in a small area(AoE) or focus on one target. [Single Target] Deals 50% Fire property magic damage [AoE/Clustered Target] 3 Hits are consumed instead of 1.

name: Exploding Dragon
description: Summons a flaming dragon that will inflict 3 strikes on all enemies in a 5*5 cell area around the cell targeted by this skill. Each cast consumes 1 Flame Stone.

name: Freezing Spear
description: Summons spears of ice that will strike a targeted enemy multiple times. Each strike inflicts an amount of damage that is equal to 85% of the caster's MATK.

name: Watery Evasion
description: Creates a water pool that will affect enemies within range by decreasing their AGI and reducing Movement Speed by half. All Ninja Class characters, including the caster, are immune to these AGI and Movement Speed penalties. The area targeted by Watery Evasion will increase the damage of the Freezing Spear skill, and enables the use of Water Ball and Aqua Benedicta for other players.

name: Snow Flake Draft
description: Summons a meteor of ice that will damage enemies in a 7*7 cell area around the caster. Freeze chance increases to 100% if target is standing on water tile. Each cast consumes 1 Ice Stone.

name: Wind Blade
description: Shoots a shearing blade of air that will inflict Wind elemental damage to a targeted enemy.

name: Lightning Jolt
description: Summons lightning bolts around the caster to damage enemies within the skill's range.

name: First Wind
description: Shoots a blade of sharp wind that will slash all enemies between the caster and the skill's target. Each cast consumes 1 Wind Stone.

name: Ninja Aura
description: Focuses spritual energy to enter Ninja Aura status, which endows the caster with INT and STR bonuses. Ninja Aura status enables the use of the Mirror Image and Killing Strike skills, although using those skills will cancel Ninja Aura status.

name: Killing Strike
requirements: Throwing Mastery 7, Shadow Slash 5, Ninja Aura 1
description: Sacrifices the caster's remaining HP to inflict devastating damage to the targeted enemy. The amount of remaining HP affects the damage inflicted, and each cast of this skill will always reduce the caster's HP to 1. [When Mirror Image is active] Terminates Mirror image effect HP is reduced to (5*AttacksLeft)% instead of 1.

name: Enlarge Weight Limit R
description: Improve Maximum Weight Limit.

name: Goodnight, Sweety
description: Make the enemy fall asleep by singing an irresistible lullaby.

name: Monster's Cry
description: Can hear a cat's crying for kicking the mice out.

name: Blowing Wind !!
description: Wind with Flowers

name: Summer Dream
description: Feels like dreaming in the middle of summer.

name: We Wish
description: (Oh! Holy Night) Sing along with the Singing Crystal's tune: We wish you a Merry Christmas, and a Happy New Year!

name: Charge Attack
description: Charge at the single enemy that's away from you at range immediately. The further the enemy is from you, the higher your ATK will be, but also increases your casting time of this skill.

name: Shrink
description: This skill activates when used and deactivates if used again or if the duration expires. If you successfully defend using Auto Guard, there is a 5% Chance per level of Guard to push the attacking enemy 2 cells away.

name: Sonic Acceleration
description: Increases the Sonic Blow Hit by +50 and Damage by +10%.

name: Throw Venom Knife
description: Throws a poisoned Dagger with a high chance of poisoning the target. This Skill requires you to have a Dagger equipped and uses up this item when executed. Throwing daggers can be purchased from the Assassin's guild.

name: Close Confine
description: For 10 seconds, you grab a single enemy, preventing you and the target to move. While you grab onto someone, you will have +10 bonus to Flee Rate. If either the victim or you die, or should the enemy teleport away, this skill is cancelled.

name: Sight Blaster
description: Summons a fireball that circles around you and hits enemies attempting to attack you at close range. When an enemy steps next to you, they will be hit by a Fire Element magic attack and pushed back 3 cells. The Fireball disappears after hitting an enemy.

name: Scroll Crafting
description: Create an Elemental Converter item or Twilight Alchemy Scroll. Refer to a Scroll Creation Manual for info about the available recipes.

name: Elemental Change (Water)
description: Converts enemy element to Water. The Elemental Change is removed upon caster logout or map change.

name: Phantasmic Arrow
description: Launches an arrow of illusion from your bow. It does 150% of weapon damage, and if it hits the enemy, it pushes them back 3 cells. You can use this skill even if you have no Arrows equipped.

name: Pang Voice
description: You scream out at a single target, causing the 'Confusion' status ailment. Does not work against Boss monsters.

name: Wink of Charm
description: Charm a target by sending them a sexy wink. For those 10 seconds, the target monster will not attack you. The higher your level is when compared to the monster, the higher the chance of this skill working. If this skill is used on a player, it has low chance of causing the 'Confusion' status ailment. This skill only works on DemiHuman, Angel and Demon type monsters and obviously, does not work against Boss monsters.

name: Unfair Trick
description: Reduces the Zeny cost of Mammonite by 10%. This is in addition to reductions made by the Discount skill.

name: Greed
description: When you use this skill, all items within 2 cells from the Blacksmith will be put into their inventory. It is not possible to use this skill during the War of Emperium or in PvP. Do note this skill does not bypass the order of who gets an item first, so you cannot use this skill to snatch an item when another player has the first priority over the item dropped.

name: Redemptio
description: Kill yourself (and receive EXP penalty), but revive all other dead party members near you. All revived players will recover 50% of their HP. The more party members you revive, the less EXP penalty will be. Casting time is 4 seconds, and this skill ignores DEX for casting time reduction Will not work if your current EXP is below 1%.

name: Ki Translation
description: Transfer one of your Spirit Spheres to another party member. Uses up 1 Spirit Sphere.

name: Ki Explosion
description: Focus your inner energies and attack an enemy to deal damage and push them away. The targeted enemy receives 300% damage, and nearby monsters will be pushed away 2 cells and stunned for 2 sec. Drains a small amount of HP per use.

name: Elemental Change (Earth)
description: Converts enemy element to Earth. The Elemental Change is removed upon caster logout or map change.

name: Elemental Change (Fire)
description: Converts enemy element to Fire. The Elemental Change is removed upon caster logout or map change.

name: Elemental Change (Wind)
description: Converts enemy element to Wind. The Elemental Change is removed upon caster logout or map change.

name: Return To El Dicastes
description: Warps you to the town of El Dicastes.

name: Buying Store
description: Type : Active Effect : Enables the ability to open a purchase stall to buy various kinds of items. Must have atleast 1 item you are buying.

name: Guardian Recall
description: Type : Active(Return) Description : Warps you to the Town of Mora. 3 seconds fixed-casting time. Skill cooldown is 5 minutes.

name: Odin's Power
description: Description : Increases for 60 seconds Attack and Magic Attack power by 70, but lowers Defense and Magic Defense by 20.

name: Remote Detonator
description: Quest Skill A remote trigger is placed in every marine sphere summoned by the Alchemist that allows them to remotely detonate all marine spheres they have summoned at will. Upon completing the trigger cast, all marine spheres summoned by the casting alchemist will explode without their standard countdown.

name: Herbicide
description: Quest Skill Uses the alchemist's knowledge to kill an unwanted plant or marine sphere that the alchemist has summoned. Marine spheres killed this way will not explode. Can be cast on self to kill all plants.

name: Scattering
description: Provides archer with alternative form of Arrow Shower which allows the ground to be targeted instead of the enemy and allows this skill to push traps.

name: Ambushing
description: Provides rogue with alternative form of Backstab which allows the skill to have no delay, but at the cost of losing the gap- closing effect.

name: Gemstone Extraction
description: Quest Skill Gives the Sage a chance to find Red, Yellow, and Blue Gemstone when killing non-boss monsters. Also gives the Sage a chance to find basic elemental stones used in the Sage's Endow skills.

name: Resource Roundup
description: Quest Skill Gives the Alchemist a chance to find various alchemical ingredients when killing non-boss monsters.

name: Soul Restore
description: Quest Skill Soon.

name: Soul Harvest
description: Quest Skill Gives the Super Novice a chance to find soul fragments from defeated non-boss enemies. Level 01-11: 0.25% drop rate Level 12-39: 0.50% drop rate Level 39+: 5.00% drop rate

name: Holy Strike
description: Melee Attacks sometimes call a Holy Property attack to vanquish your foes. The skill does [100 + STR + (1 + Base Level)]% ATK. Activation rate is 20% and is increased by 1% for every 10 LUK.

name: Triage
description: Can only be granted by cards. Uses 4 SP to restore 50 HP.

name: Fire Walk
description: Can only be granted by cards. Generate blaze under the caster's feet, leaving a trail of Fire property hazard when walking.

name: Shadow's Within
description: Amplifies the lethality of Shadow Slash, Shadow Slash gains the ability to land critical hits, The chance of Shadow Slash delivering a critical strike increases by 50%. Turns the target's direction to face caster. The cooldown of Shadow Slash extends to a fixed duration of 3 seconds

name: Zeny Pincher
description: While active, Mammonite deals 40% of its normal damage, no longer consumes Zeny.

name: Trick Arrow
description: Consumes 1 arrow to do a ranged attack that damages the enemy with two hits. Can only be used while a bow is equipped. Deals 200% damage and triggers a random status effect in between Slow, Bleeding, Poison, Blind or Silence. The status effect can be resisted Each of the two hits can also trigger Status effect that a normal attack would.

name: Flight Pattern
description: Alter the behaviour of Blitzbeat when it is automatically casted. Note: This skill is not yet implemented, it will be usable with Trans Release The alteration depends on the level selected. LV | Effect

levels.effect: Broad Wings: Increases splash radius to 9x9.
Bloody Claws: 30% to cause Bleed and Critical Wounds Level 2.
Frequent Flights: Halved damage, doubled trigger rate.
Falcon Attack: Lower Auto-Blitzbeat trigger rate to LUK/10, triggers Falcon Assault instead.

name: Quick Step
description: Quickly dash up to two cells behind the target. Deals 10% damage on target if it's an enemy.

name: Weakness Exploit
description: Additively increases Double Attack chance when using a bow in certain condition. -Target has been hit in the last 30 seconds by Strip or Trick Arrow -Target suffers from Silence, Curse, Poison, Stun or Blind.

name: Stolen Goods
description: Rogues have a chance to steal a unique coin when defeating enemies. In the right place, these coins hold special value and may be exchanged for rare goods. Level 01-11: 0.25% drop rate Level 12-39: 0.50% drop rate Level 39+: 5.00% drop rate

name: Touch of Heal
description: This works exactly like the Acolyte's Heal skill, healing the target HP. The healed amount depends only on the Homunculus's LV and Int. Each cast requires 1 Condensed Red Potion.

name: Emergency Avoid
description: Helps avoiding dangerous situations by temporarily increasing player's and Homunculus's movement speed. MoveSpeed Bonus | Lasting Time

name: Brain Surgery
description: By training the Lif you increase her Maximum SP and SP regeneration rate. This also increases the effect of the Touch of Heal skill. SP Increase / SP Regen Bonus / HT Bonus

name: Mental Change
description: For the skill's duration, Homunculus's Maximum HP and SP are switched. Non-skill attacks are increased by the Lif's Matk value. Upon activation, Homunculus's HP is fully healed. After the skill's duration has ended, HP and SP are set to 10.

name: Castling
description: Instantaenuously switch the location of the player and the Homunculus. The monsters that were attacking the player will now attack the Homunculus instead.

name: Defense
description: Temporarily increase Def of the Homunculus and the player.

name: Adamantium Skin
description: Pernamently increase the Def, Maximum HP and HP regeneration rate of the Homunculus. HP Bonus / Regen Bonus / Def Bonus

name: Blood Lust
description: For the spells duration, Homunculus's damage is increased and every attack has a certain chance to leech 20% of the damage as HP.

name: Moonlight
description: Order Filir to attack the target with its beak, hitting the target for SkillLV times with a damage bonus of (10+110*SkillLV)%. Times Hit | Total Damage

name: Fleet Move
description: Temporarily increase ASPD by +(3*SkillLV)% and Attack Power by (105+5*SkillLV)% of Filir (maybe the increase is only 5+5*SkillLV?). ASPD Bonus | Damage Bonus | Lasting Time / After-cast Delay

name: Over Speed
description: Temporarily increase the Flee Rate of your Homunculus by 10+10*SkillLV. Flee Bonus | Lasting Time / Cool Down [Lv 1] - 20 - 60 sec / 60 sec [Lv 2] - 30 - 55 sec / 70 sec [Lv 3] - 40 - 50 sec / 80 sec [Lv 4] - 50 - 45 sec / 90 sec [Lv 5] - 60 - 40 sec / 120 sec

name: S.B.R.44
description: Lower your Filir's intimacy level in exchange for high damage to a single target.

name: Caprice
description: Use one of the Bolt-type spells. Homunculus decides randomly which one it uses, you can not influence its decision. The skill level used for the random Bolt-type spell depends on current skill level of Caprice. LV | Effect

name: Chaotic Benediction
description: It randomly uses Heal up to the current Chaotic Benediction skill level to either one of the following: Player (you), enemy that you are attacking or Homunculus itself at following success rate. (Enemy / Homunculus / Player)

name: Change Instruction
description: Increase your Homunculus's Int and Str. Also helps on creating potions, the bonus is +1% per skill level if the Homunculus is active.

name: Bio Explosion
description: Homunculus self destructs and inflicts defense ignoring damage on everything within a 9x9 cells around it. The damage is based on the Homunculus Maximum HP, and after the attack, its intimacy is reduced to 1.

name: Bash
description: A melee attack with Atk equal to (100+30*SkillLV)%. There is a Hit bonus of 5*SkillLV. If the character has the Fatal Blow skill as well, levels 6-10 will add a chance to Stun of 5%*(Bash SkillLV - 5) plus a bonus depending on BaseLV.

name: Magnum Break
description: 5x5 cells, Fire element splash attack with Atk of (100+20*SkillLV)% and a +10*SkillLV bonus to HIT. Enemies hit by the attack are pushed back 2 cells. Drains 15 HP per use, but cannot kill character. After usage, it adds a 20% Fire-elemental bonus to Atk that lasts for 10 seconds. After the cast the attack sequence is not interrupted.

name: Bowling Bash
description: Hits one enemy with an Atk of (100+40*SkillLV)%. The enemy is knocked back up to 5 cells. If that enemy hits any other enemies, then the hit becomes a 3x3 cell melee splash attack at that point with additional damage to these secondary targets. During the Cast Time character's Def is reduced to 2/3.

name: Parry
description: You automatically block attacks with a success chance of (5*SkillLV)%. This allows you to Auto Guard melee and ranged attacks with your two-handed sword. This Skill also enables you to parry the following skills: Bash, Bowling Bash, Pierce, Spiral Pierce, Brandish Spear, Spear Boomerang, Shield Boomerang, Grand Cross, Asura Strike, Soul Breaker, Double Strafing, Arrow Shower and Investigate. When you block you cannot attack (but unlike Auto Guard, there is no delay). Use this when you get mobbed. Two Hand sword needed

name: Reflect Shield
description: Returns some damage dealt to you back to the enemy. Melee attacks only. Reflected Damage is (10+3*SkillLV)% of received damage. Requires an equipped shield and ignores size modifications.

name: Berserk
description: Requires you to have a JobLV of at least 50. It triples your HP and replenishes them (to the now tripled maximum), doubles your Damage, increases your ASPD by 30%, increases your movement speed (does not stack with other increase except Peco Peco), gives the Endure effect at no further cost but halves your Flee Rate and sets ALL Def AND Mdef to 0 for the skill's duration. It also drains 5% of your current HP every 15 seconds. You cannot chat (chat mute), change equips, use any healing items or receive any heals while this skill is in effect. You do not regain HP and SP naturally for 5 minutes after the skill ends (you can be healed or use items though). The Skill cancels out if your HP drops to 100 or below. Can be used during Guild Siege.

name: Double Strafing
description: Ranged attack, that fires two arrows and hits with an Atk of (180+20*SkillLV)%. Requires an equipped bow. Only 1 arrow is consumed.

name: Arrow shower
description: Knock Back: 1 cell 5x5 cells, ranged splash attack with an Atk of (75+5*SkillLV)%. Enemies hit by the attack are pushed back 1 cell. Requires an equipped bow. Only 1 arrow is consumed.

name: Skid Trap
description: Knock Back: (5 + (Skill Level*1) A Skid Trap is a trap that activates when someone comes within SkillLV cells of it. When activated, the affected target is pushed back 5+SkillLV cells (10 cells if the skill is at level 5). Skid Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any Hide revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. Does not work on Boss and Plant monsters. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Skid Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed.

levels.effect: Sliding Range 6 cells, Setting Time 300 secs
Sliding Range 7 cells, Setting Time 240 secs
Sliding Range 8 cells, Setting Time 180 secs
Sliding Range 9 cells, Setting Time 120 secs
Sliding Range 10 cells, Setting Time 60 secs

name: Land Mine
description: A Land Mine is a visible trap that explodes when stepped on, hitting the monster or player (in PvP only) that triggered it for [(Dex+75)*(1+Int/100)*SkillLV] damage. This skill ignores Def and Mdef and damage modification cards for size and family, but not elemental element. There is also a (5*SkillLV+30)% chance to stun targets for 5 seconds. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Land Mine will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed.

name: Sandman
description: A Sandman is a trap that activates when stepped on. All targets in a 3x3 area around the trap will have an (40+10*SkillLV)% chance of being affected by "Sleep" (duration depends on SkillLV). A Sandman is invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Sandman will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed.

name: Freezing Trap
description: A Freezing Trap is a trap that activates when stepped on. When activated, it will hit all in the area with a Frost Nova style attack. Damage is (25+25*SkillLV)% of your normal Atk. Chance to Freeze is Unknown and does not work against Boss monsters. Freezing Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Freezing Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed.

name: Remove Trap
description: Turns one set trap back into a Trap item. You only get one trap even if you needed two for setting it. Can be used with an Ankle Snare that has already caught a target, but in this case you will not get a Trap item. Only works with your own traps.

name: Charge Arrow
description: Ranged attack at 150% damage. The target is pushed back 6 cells. Only 1 arrow is consumed.

name: Sharpshooting
description: Arrow attack that will affect every enemy in a 3 cell wide corridor along its flight path up to its maximum range of 14 cells. The corridor is a straight line between the caster and its target. If the target is closer than 14 cells, the corridor will continue up to its full length. It affects all enemies along this path with an increased Atk (by 50% per SkillLV) and a +20 bonus to CRIT.

name: Pierce
description: Hits for an Atk of (100+10*SkillLV)%. Number of hits depends on the size of the target. Small = 1, Medium = 2, Large = 3. Players are considered to be medium. [Small]: 1 Hit [Medium]: 2 Hits [Big]: 3 Hits

name: Brandish Spear
description: An area attack with an Atk of (100+20*SkillLV)%.

name: Spiral Pierce
description: Extend your spear, and spin it in a spiral fashion to increase overall damage and ability to pierce. A more powerful version of Pierce which ignores Def and Vit Def and also stun-locks your opponent for 3 sec. Damage is (100+50*SkillLV)% damage. The attack is 5 hits with the damage divided evenly between the hits. However you can increase damage further by increasing the weight of your weapon (upgrades count too! LV 1 weapons +10/upgrade, LV 2 weapons +15/upgrade, LV 3 weapons +25/upgrade). Although damage will increase with better skill level, so will the Cast Time / Cool Down. Aura Blade does not add damage to this skill. Recent tests revealed the following (rather complex) formula: [(80% of weapons weight times (100%+level*50%) + (round.down(Str/10^2) + Upgrade Damage) * size modifier (small 125%, medium 100%, large 75%)) * card factors (+20% and such) * element factors ]* 5 hits

name: Defender
description: Decreases the Atk of ranged attacks against the caster by (5+15*SkillLV)%, but also lowers ASPD by (25-5*SkillLV)% and walking speed by 1/3 while active. The higher the level the lower the values, up to SkillLV 5 which has no speed reductions. Can be shared with party members when the Devotion skill is casted on them, but the movement reduction will affect them too. Caster must have a shield equipped.

name: Auto Guard
description: Gives you the ability to completely block attacks. Requires an equipped Shield. When you block an attack, you will be unable to move for 0.3 seconds for SkillLV 1-5. SkillLV 6-9 delays your movement for 0.2 sec and SkillLV 10 for 0.1 sec.

name: Devotion
description: Protect party members by taking the full damage that they are receiving. They must be in range to benefit from this, once they leave the skill is canceled and needs to be recasted. Damage taken is based on the Def of the person who gets hit, not the Crusader that takes the hit. If the caster has any self casted, class native enhancements on him, e.g. Endure (Endure transfer is disabled in WoE), Providence or Reflect Shield, the party member(s) will share these benefits, too. This skill cannot be used on other Crusaders. The level difference between the caster and the target must be equal or less than 10 (within normal EXP share range). The number of possible protected party members is 1*SkillLV. Should the HP of Crusader drop below 25%, Devotion will be canceled.

name: Magnificat
description: Double the caster and party members SP Recovery Rate for the duration of the skill.

name: Weapon Quicken
description: Temporarily increase Attack Speed with Two Handed Sword Class Weapons.

name: Sight
description: Nullifies the Hide, Tunnel Drive and Cloaking effects within range.

name: Crash
description: Deals a single hit with a chance to stun.

name: Regain
description: Recovers the target from both sleep and stun status.

name: Tender
description: Recovers the target from both freezing and stone status.

name: Benediction
description: Recovers the target from both curse and blind status.

name: Recuperate
description: Recovers the target from both poison and silence status.

name: Mental Cure
description: Recovers the target from both hallucination and chaos status.

name: Compress
description: Recovers the target from bleeding status.

name: Provoke
description: Lowers the enemy Def and Vit Def by (5+5*SkillLV)% and increases their Atk by (2+3*SkillLV)%. Undead and Boss monsters are not affected.

name: Auto Berserk
description: When your HP goes below 25%, you gain the effect of Provoke L10 on yourself. That means +32% damage and -60% Vit Def. The effect lasts until the character returns to more than 25% HP. The skill can be set to activate or not. The skill will even function after it has drained all your SP.

name: Decrease agility
description: Decreases Agi of target by 2+SkillLV and reduces movement speed by 25%. The skill can fail and success is indicated by the text "Agi down" on the target at the time of casting. A successful cast will dispel Increase Agility, Adrenaline Rush, Two-Hand Quicken, Spear Quicken and Cart Boost. The effects of this skill combine with Quagmire in the form Agi/2-2+SkillLV. The formula for success is believed to be SuccessRate = 40 + 2*SkillLV + (BaseLV + Int)/5 - Target Mdef where SuccessRate is expressed as a percentage. Duration is halved on players. Does not work against Boss monsters.

name: Scapegoat
description: The mercenary gives all of its remaining HP to the summoner and dies. Any excess HP is discarded.

name: Lex Divina
description: This skill has a chance of inflicting the Silence status on the selected target. Does not work against Boss monsters. The chance is equal to 100 - (TargetVit + TargetLuk/8) + Int/15 %. Casting this spell on a target that is already silenced will remove the silence status.

name: Monster Property
description: Brings up a window with information about the targeted monster such as HP, element, level, etc at the time the spell is cast. Party members also see this window.

name: Kyrie Eleison
description: Creates a Kyrie Eleison effect on the target character. This effect will block MaxHPofTarget*(10+2*SkillLV)% damage OR (5+SkillLV/2) hits, whichever is reached first. Damage in excess of the amount blocked will transfer through and count as a hit of lowered damage. Hits are only assessed when a blow would normally land and not for every swing by a monster (despite showing an "Auto Guard" graphic with every swing for the effected player and a miss for every other player). Any Magic attack will do full damage to the affected target, while still counting against the maximum damage and number of hits of Kyrie Eleison. Casting Holy Light or Assumptio on someone with this effect will cancel it entirely. When a second instance is cast on a target, then it will replace the first instance.

name: Blessing
description: Increase targeted player's Dex, Int and Str for Blessing's duration. Can also cancel abnormal statuses from Curse and Stone Curse.

name: Increase Agility
description: Increases Agi of target by 2+SkillLV and increases movement speed by 25%. Casting is accompanied by the "Agi UP" message over the target. Dispels Decrease Agility when cast. Dispelled by Decrease Agility and Quagmire. A monster or player in the area of effect of a Quagmire spell cannot receive the benefits of Increase Agility. This skill consumes some HP along with the SP cost.

name: Approval
description: Certification as an official guild of the Rune Midgard Kingdom. Members of official guilds are authorized to attack the Emperium inside guild territories. Without this skill all attacks on the Emperium will miss!! To disband a guild use the command /breakguild "guildname".

name: Kafra Contract
description: Sign a contract with the Kafra Headquarter in Aldebaran. Through the contract the guild can hire a Kafra Employee for their castle who will provide warps and storage for the guild members.

name: Guardian Research
description: Study the Guardian technology. Allows the guild to hire Guardians for their territory.

name: Build up the Guardian
description: The guild Guardians gain bonuses to their Maximum HP, Atk and ASPD.

name: Guild Extension
description: Increase the maximum capacity of guildsmen by +6 per SkillLV.

name: Guild's Glory
description: Permits the use of a guild emblem. Emblem Creation Process: 1. Select a design for the Emblem. 2. Emblems must be 24x24 pixels in BMP format using 256 colors 3. Create a folder named Emblem inside the Payon Stories folder and copy the emblem file there. If you are the guild master, you must place the emblem inside the Emblem folder in the game directory.

name: Great Leadership
description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Str bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Wounds of Glory
description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Vit bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Soul of Cold
description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Agi bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges. This skill is unconfirmed.

name: Sharp Hawk Eyes
description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Dex bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Battle Orders
description: All guild members visible on the Guild Leaders screen will receive a +5 bonus to Str, Dex and Int. This skill lasts for 1 minute, and caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Regeneration
description: All guild members visible on the Guild Leaders screen increase their HP and SP regeneration rate. Once used, caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Restore
description: All guild members visible on the Guild Master screen will have their HP and SP restored to 90% of the respective maximum. Once used, caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges.

name: Emergency Call
description: All guild members will be teleported next to the Guild Master. Once used, caster must wait 10 minutes before using this skill again.

name: Emsolute Develop
description: Gives 50% chance to get an additional, free economy point when investing into a castle's economy.

name: Guild Storage Expansion
description: Target : P Allows to use Guild Storage. Guild Storage Slots can be increased
